sql_array: CREATE TABLE mime_test (id INT, part VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO mime_test (id, part) VALUES (1, MIME_BODY(vector(MIME_PART(null, null, null, 'Hello World!'))));
UPDATE mime_test SET part = MIME_BODY(vector(MIME_PART(null, null, 'base64', 'U29tZSBleGFtcGxl')) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT part FROM mime_test WHERE id = 1;
